title: lauro-cerasus multiglandulosa
intro: Lauro-cerasus multiglandulosa, also known as the Chinese cherry or multiglandular cherry, is a deciduous tree species in the genus Prunus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lauro-cerasus multiglandulosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Lauro-cerasus multiglandulosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its fruit and leaves can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other herbal preparations.
